title: Custom announcements across Teams/Workspaces - (announcement banner)
excerpt: Hello! I have been a big fan of the “Announcement Banner” functionality that was added to Monday a few months ago. It is a very convenient way to spread a non-urgent message to all users on my account, especially when th…

posts.author: bloshinsky (Ben Loshinsky)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I have been a big fan of the “Announcement Banner” functionality that was added to Monday a few months ago. It is a very convenient way to spread a non-urgent message to all users on my account, especially when the info is about Monday itself. I use this quite often to announce new features/boards/automations that have been added across the account.

I would love a way to be able to choose where or to who these announcement banners go to. For example, if I add a new board to a Project Management Workspace, I want to post an announcement banner to just a particular team, or to the workspace where I made the change - I dont want the sales people seeing this update. It would be amazing if there was some kind of “announcements center” where you can have multiple live announcements for different teams, workspaces, or even people. One step further, allow the banner to scroll through different announcements if there are multiple announcements for that team/workspace.

posts.author: KColosiPCCI (Kristen Colosi)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to be able to put a timer on how long the announcement display, an auto expiration period.
